h7c4c1e7fg71b2g44a4g8ef1ge1978f7401ce: *You feel its connection. Its longing to be opened - to share its secrets.*
h59a54cb0g8f5ag4862gb7f6g8f0fa83f0c0c: *You open the book to the first page, with its shifting glyphs and strange whispers.*
h3e1d6940g886bg4fd6g88d7gcf2e807c5d7a: *You open the book where you left off, the glyphs dancing before your eyes.*
hcdb04367g3975g4bafg8ebeg151cf7f39eed: *You open the book where you left off, and the voices return, chiding you for your indecision.*
h17de0831ga5d2g498bg9a01g8f5b46b37374: *The book is locked tight, with no visible keyhole - only an oval recess in the cover's mouth.*
h39e4cf59gb124g4737ga633g5968767c805c: *You try to examine the book, but the longer you stare, the more those piercing, amethyst eyes draw you in.*
h942b68edg416fg449dgb3dcgb914da6a5717: *You can sense something dark about this tome - something profane.*
h2112a66dgcf6cg4c86g81deg8d0682a3fff0: A cursed book? How obvious. Whoever opens it deserves the fate that befalls them.
h6903888cg43fag4169g9427gbeb7da557c2d: Curious. Why don't you take a closer look... I'll observe from back here.
h821b5e54g8973g4698g9a4cg5e91e11fbe3d: Please don't open the creepy book.
hfc48ead6g2dc0g4e35ga085ge62cefee6e4b: Cast that filth aside. There is little to be learned from scribblings - much less from Thay.
h2b3d98f8g87c6g4b6cga6d4ge85d4e0d5d6b: That looks terribly heavy. Why don't you let me carry it for you?
h5de634d6gc5afg4a04g9867g35ce60bc910f: That thing is bad news. Hand it here; I'll look after it.
h72198362gf2d6g4844gada6g51a29a42f8a5: How about you just leave it where you found it, and we saunter away?
h5dd7b842gda2bg426eg9835g0ccfcdce3902: I've my fair share of experience with dangerous books. I'll take that off your hands - into more prepared ones.
h7a38ae85gfc76g448ag8337ge491cad8561e: Place the amethyst in the slot on the book's cover.
h94e98341gaa97g4791g8b80g427348bf4be9: *The book's pull is irresistable; you feel changed, bettered, for having opened it. Suddenly, you are capable of anything - felling mountains, darkening suns, conversing with the dead.*
h26d75bd4g0e11g4868ga493g847775442eb9: *Glyphs shift gently before your eyes. Words slip into your mind, onto your lips, forming words you don't understand. And something is trying to reply.*
h60ebff9eg71c1g48b7gab11g9b2e74ba7bf7: *The symbols dart beneath your eyes, warping and twisting. Your head throbs, but you almost understand.*
he65ebd9bg0d7cg46d3g9f4bg9d31d1ccb671: *The world around you is gone - you can only see those glyphs, only hear those voices.*
hbe8c9b03gfa81g4489gbaabgb7b553955f50: *You feel claws moving in the shadows. They pull at you, dragging you closer.*
h1c363afeg2e25g4771gadc5g50980495ae24: Urge your hand to turn another page.
h0a4504c7gbbfbg4fb0ga27dge1360394fd89: *The glyphs scream, branding your mind with strange runes. You see time rewritten - fate undone - your future thrumming with power.*
h9c5740c3g33cfg41c4ga0ceg171a8e0c7260: *Black strands of Weave curl all about you, only to sink as into graves as you try to grab hold. Necromantic spells - tantalisingly powerful - slip away forever.*
he75bdaecga151g4292g8f59g61b6b7ba55e6: *You struggle to cling to scraps of what you know - powerful necromancy, you're sure - but it darts away, leaving only Hells' screams.*
h9b474153gcfe8g4ae3g880eg657ee7f40398: *The book snaps closed. You've seen too much. What profane knowledge is now seared inside of you, you should never have known.*
h0f1a1bbdg8191g4217gb9efgf437a16e95e2: *The glyphs scream, searing your mind. You feel lost, tossed in a sea of arcane power you can neither control nor comprehend.*
hdaec0107gea5ag4561g8cc2g6de8e27cf38d: *The claws try to grip your hands, try to stop you, but you slam the book shut before they can take you.*
h6817b9a1g0cdbg4435gafc0g77e0e4a7a46d: *The whispers, the pain - it all disappears in an instant. You are yourself again.*
hf7660582g0a2eg4bcagab8dg0a1d407fa68d: *You try to close the book, but claws tear at you from the darkness. You can feel them on your body - in your soul, scratching and tearing at your sanity.*
h7c99c69ag3babg4a49gaa2bg079201170a93: Welcome the darkness in the name of your god and turn the page.
h1f96d6dcgf572g4114g8742ga67260244eee: Welcome the darkness in the name of your god and turn the page.
ha39b5ebdg3113g4e02ga2c4g5ef2ad356124: Drink in the darkness, embracing it, and turn the page.
hdc35b535gb5a0g44f6gbc4bga4edb5a14b19: *Every symbol seems to burn your eyes. You can feel them searing into your mind - into your soul.*
h2bdf3678gf8a9g4cb8g8c0eg0cb7497631d8: *The whispers, the pain - it all disappears in an instant. You are yourself again.*
h27b7758eg7639g4cefgb966g7ae7aa915f24: *All you can see are those symbols. All you can hear are the whispers - there is nothing else.*
h8bb69edfg22e6g4403ga62dgce35cbbe4947: Turn to the next page, wary of any arcane tricks.
h82599fe7g2da6g4e3bga235g10eee50b183f: *The symbols move aggressively, probing your mental defences, but you hold strong. For now.*
h39277e7bg6badg4fedgba79g759792ad8b2f: Ask your patron to guard your mind and turn to the next page.
h66748cb5g74a7g447ag9a18ge53f5fb2604e: *The symbols move aggressively, probing your mental defences. Your patron is there to defend you, but there's only so much they can do.*
h8f5b1167g0207g41eegbb5dgedae1c9adf8f: Drop the tome, ready to destroy it.
ha30c9d26g91e8g44dbg80a0g7398387f8e8c: *You feel better the second the book is out of your hands.*
hbb6730e2g6c42g4e57g8a38g603db4510e79: You can't be serious. Give it to me this instant!
h72fee232g7e72g44f4gb6e0g942559639b55: *The voices return. Louder. Stronger. Commanding you to stop...*
ha090c254gac5cg4ccfg8b7cgd0c74541ca82: *...but they have no hold on you. All you have to do is strike.*
h53afa523g4444g4165gb09egd6a535144169: What are you doing? That's no way to treat a book!
hfc6d5bb6gd80bg47c4gb5c5gfde762ed5ffc: Go on then. Better out than in.
h54c2bcb0gd80dg4338ga20egacb19eb0ed39: Right. It's just... a bit of... hmm.
hebe6c0c1g80abg4dfdgb43ag4fcd2094a8c8: *You watch her flick through the book, her face tensing as she goes.*
hd7388de1g4b9fg4622g9faagdaae1a7a22a4: Enough. Deep into the pack it goes.
h695998c6g95f4g4356g89a8gae3087bcee73: *You don't know what he read, but it had an effect. His eyes are hungry, but pained.*
h37e00570gb7fbg4a07ga993g35e8becaa02d: Well. Quite the page turner. I'll get back to it when I have more time to focus.
h4270a362g6275g47aeg8638g2377e002fd1c: *You watch Gale perusing the book with a true wizard's fascination. A few pages in, something startles him.*
h74d37d2ege605g4871g8c31g9960df0c3323: A rough read indeed... I'll give it my undivided attention at a more appropriate time.
h69d0745cg4390g4b15ga9fagbeb5ab8990d2: *You feel the darkness radiating from the book. It's delicious.*
hcfb43da7g9f88g4597g9a7fg306562821180: *You've seen similar books in wizard's libraries - a tome on Thayan magic. A rare and expensive find, but people have gone mad reading less dangerous texts.*
hf762c766g6b6ag4933g9dfdg21bfdb68e378: *The book refuses to open - for you, at least.*
hcb7b5048gc6c1g4952g8bc2g4b7421a461a7: *As you look into the book's amethyst eyes, you can almost hear a voice. You just have to open the book, and it will be yours. Forever.*
